# dx-smoke-app

Generated with `create-litsx-app --template app`.

## First Run

1. `npm install`
2. `npm run dev`
3. Open the local Vite URL and edit `src/dx-smoke-app.jsx`

## Scripts

- `npm run dev`
- `npm run build`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run preview`

## What This Template Shows

- authored LitSX JSX
- `@click` event binding
- local state with `useState(...)`
- component-owned styling with `static styles = ...`
